chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S- 60 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on MA 5326/23 3.For hearing of main case. Mr. Shamsuddin N. Kobhar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Rafique Kalwar, Advocate for respondents. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. Date of Hearing & Order: 24-11-2023 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.- With the consent, this Crl. Transfer Application is allowed. Sessions Case No.204 of 2022 re: Muhammad Aslam & others, arising out of Crime No.96 of 2021, registered at P.S, Adilpur for offence under sections 302, 147, 148, 149 PPC is withdrawn from the file of learned III-Additional Sessions Judge, Ghotki and transferred and assigned to the Court of learned II-Additional Sessions Judge, Ghotki, where counter case/counter-blast bearing sessions case No.308 of 2021 re: Gulsher Ahmed and others, arising out of Crime No.49 of 2021, P.S, Adilpur under sections 302 etc. is already pending, for disposal in accordance with law. This Crl. Transfer Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
